description:
Watch a summary of the verbal clashes between Croatian Member of the European Parliament Mislav Kolakušić and the President of the European Commission, the French President Macron, the head of the European Central Bank Christine Lagarde, former Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau, and the President of the European Council Charles Michel, on various issues crucial to the lives of European Union citizens: the war in Ukraine, European Union debt, the suppression of civil rights, and corruption.
Mislav Kolakušić served as a Member of the European Parliament from 2019 to 2024 and repeatedly warned that the direction in which the European Union was heading was harmful to the vast majority of European citizens.

#europeanunion #ursulavonderleyen #macron #france #europeanparliament
fulltitle: Mislav Kolakušić verbalno pomeo Ursulu vd Leyen, Macrona, Trudeau, šeficu ECB-a i šefa EU vijeća
